task_summaries.task_scope: Determine if perfect correlations among feature pairs arise from inherent network traffic properties or preprocessing steps using correlation and redundancy evidence.
Identify which feature pairs contribute to shortcut-like signals due to redundancy using shortcut and dependency analyses.
Assess how redundancies affect effective feature dimensionality and dependency stability within the dataset.
Explore if removing or consolidating redundant features alters class-conditioned patterns and distributional properties.
